name: Cafe Vienna Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the instant coffee, sugar, nonfat dry milk, and cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a blender.
4. Blend until the mixture is powdered and evenly distributed.
5. Use 2 teaspoons of this mix for every cup of hot water when preparing your beverage.
